query:
-- Analytics aggregation tables
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS analytics_daily_metrics (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  date DATE NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  transaction_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  transaction_volume DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  parcel_registrations INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  verification_requests INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  verification_approvals INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  verification_rejections INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  avg_processing_time_hours DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  revenue DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  active_users INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_analytics_daily_date ON analytics_daily_metrics(date);

-- System performance metrics
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS analytics_system_metrics (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  metric_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  metric_value DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  metadata JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_analytics_system_timestamp ON analytics_system_metrics(timestamp);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_analytics_system_type ON analytics_system_metrics(metric_type);
